error.cannot_connect: Could not talk to the modem on that device.
error.not_registered: Modem is not registered on the network (check SIM/antenna).

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Send an SMS message via the SIM800C module.

message.name: Message
message.description: Message text (Cyrillic and other Unicode supported).

force_unicode.name: Force Unicode
force_unicode.description: Always send as UCS2 even if the text fits GSM 7-bit.

call.name: Call
call.description: Place a voice call to a number and automatically hang up after it rings. Returns whether the call was answered. No audio is played.

ring_duration.name: Ring duration
ring_duration.description: Seconds to let the call ring before hanging up (1-120). The call also ends early if the other party answers or hangs up.

hang_up.name: Hang up
hang_up.description: Hang up the current call, if any.
